title: Referral Questionnaire
description: Answer a few referral questions to create the referral document checklist. Agents prepare and send forms in their e-sign system, then upload the signed copies here.

questions.label: What type of client is being referred?
Is the receiving broker or agent known?
Is this tied to a relocation company or third-party referral network?

document_rules.name: Client Referral Authorization / Introduction
document_rules.reason: Documents client permission and referral handoff

document_rules.name: Receiving Broker / Agent Confirmation
document_rules.reason: Confirms the receiving party and referral terms

document_rules.name: Closing / Lease Confirmation
document_rules.reason: Supports referral fee tracking once the referred transaction closes

document_rules.name: Relocation / Third-Party Referral Agreement
document_rules.reason: Referral involves a relocation company or third-party network
